Types

Core type definitions: enums, named tuples, and data structures.

Type definitions for jaxlibxc.

class jaxlibxc._types.Family(*values)[source]

Bases: IntEnum

LDA = 1
GGA = 2
MGGA = 4
class jaxlibxc._types.Kind(*values)[source]

Bases: IntEnum

EXCHANGE = 0
CORRELATION = 1
EXCHANGE_CORRELATION = 2
KINETIC = 3
class jaxlibxc._types.FunctionalInfo(number, name, family, kind, references)[source]

Bases: NamedTuple

Parameters:

  • number (int)

  • name (str)

  • family (Family)

  • kind (Kind)

  • references (tuple)

number: int

Alias for field number 0

name: str

Alias for field number 1

family: Family

Alias for field number 2

kind: Kind

Alias for field number 3

references: tuple

Alias for field number 4

class jaxlibxc._types.FunctionalDef(info, energy_fn, default_params, n_internal=0)[source]

Bases: NamedTuple

Definition of a primitive functional in the registry.

Parameters:

  • info (FunctionalInfo)

  • energy_fn (Callable)

  • default_params (dict)

  • n_internal (int)

info: FunctionalInfo

Alias for field number 0

energy_fn: Callable

Alias for field number 1

default_params: dict

Alias for field number 2

n_internal: int

Alias for field number 3

class jaxlibxc._types.MixedDef(info, components, default_params, hyb_exx=0.0)[source]

Bases: NamedTuple

Definition of a mixed/hybrid functional.

Parameters:

  • info (FunctionalInfo)

  • components (tuple)

  • default_params (dict)

  • hyb_exx (float)

info: FunctionalInfo

Alias for field number 0

components: tuple

Alias for field number 1

default_params: dict

Alias for field number 2

hyb_exx: float

Alias for field number 3
